snippet.title: Mission Valentine | Ashish Chanchlani
snippet.description:
Download the OctaFX Trading App at https://bit.ly/Chanchlani_OctaFX and get 5000 USD in your demo account ūüíĶ. Start making extra money with the "Best Forex Broker in India 2020" - OctaFXūüŹÜūüďą

Aa gaya humara naya video
MISSION VALENTINE!
PURA VIDEO END TAK DEKHNA
Warna maza nai aaega
Bahut time baad tum sab seth logo ke lie ek one story video banayi
Haan maalum hai tum sabko laga 3rd part aaega valentine ka 
Lekin dekha humne kaise usko tease kiya video meinūüėČ
Acha sachi bolta hu is video ke peeche 1 mahina lag gaya,from scripting to editing islie itna delay ho gaya video
Maafi seth log.
But maza aa gaya
Ye descrption main aaj subah ke 6 baje hagte hue likh raha hu socho kitni fatt gayiūüėā
Wo sab chodho ye humara pehla video hai jisme humne first time ek naye aspect ko introduce kiya aur normalize kiya
(Lekin DOKHA paap hai saalo yaad rakhna)
Abhi suno kasam se kehta hu is baar puri ki puri editing maine ki
Is baar video mein puri ki puri ACV team hai
Except Anmol
Except Grishim
Except Muski
Okay lol..
Is video mein kaafi naye chehre bhi dekhne mile honge jinhone bahut amazing performance diya
Introducing ACV team mein Bhavika Motwani as kaam-waali didi
Super talented Vivek Menon (@Watermenon Pictures ) apne beyounick ki team se (teesra hawaldar after kunal & tusharūüėā)
Aur to aur wo hotel waali ladki jo bhaag gayi Ritika bajaj
Baaki sab purane chawal hai ACV team ke likhte likhte thak jaunga
@Akash Dodeja as mc dost
@Kunal Chhabhria  as lavaris baap
@Simran Dhanwani meri valentine 
Manvita Chhabhria (kunal ki real life biwi aur meri reel life mummy)
@Rohit Sadhwani  as harami manager
@Ritesh Sadhwani  wo paneer-dudh waala 
@Tanish Sirwani  wo dank hotel guest
@Jashan Sirwani  wo hotel waala jo mam ke saath aaya tha
Akash jagtap wo acha desh ka nagrik jo buzurko ki madad karta hai (dont judge a book by its cover)
@Paras Rupani  as bhagoda boyfriend
Animesh Makhija wo nanga dodta hua guest (bhai ki body achi thi toh nanga scene kiya apne liyeūüôĆūüŹĽ)
Karan dhanwani rota hua aashiq (dhyaan se dekhna)
Camera @Siddharth Kedare  urf cinderella ne sambhala (shoot khatam hote hi bhaag jaata hai saala)
Lights aur production sirwani brothers ( mere mama ke ladke, aaj kal 50 r lete hai din ka)
Sound handling by ritesh wohi dudh waala
Ladka acha hai but jokes gande maarta hai
Wo hotel couple of wala scene ka idea was idea by Ashi chawla (idea ache deta hai par shooting se darta hai)
Baaki script writing & direction by your chanchu‚Ě§ÔłŹ
Seth log agar ye video pasand aayi toh please
Like chodh ke jaana
Mast comment karna favorite scene aur video apne committed (if they exist) as well as single ( matlab sab logūüėā)
ke saath share karna
Baaki toh tum seth log ko  maalum hai tumhara ashu tum acvians se kitna pyaar karta haiūüėė
#AshishChanchlani #MissionValentine #Acvians

snippet.title: All the Prime Minister‚Äôs Men  | Al Jazeera Investigations
snippet.description:
Click here for the Bangla Language: https://youtu.be/B1BM79J863o
An explosive investigation reveals how a criminal gang is colluding with the security forces of Bangladesh and has links to Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina.

Undercover reporters with the I-Unit expose how a former street mafia claims to have captured a state. The brother of Bangladesh‚Äôs army chief boasts that he can use police and paramilitary units to abduct rivals and earn millions in bribes.

Documents obtained by the I-Unit also show that head of the army has helped a convicted killer evade justice. And how the country‚Äôs military intelligence service has secretly bought spyware from Israel ‚Äď a country that Bangladesh does not recognise ‚Äď that can monitor the prime minister‚Äôs political rivals. 

The I-Unit invited all those involved in this investigation to respond to our findings. They included Bangladesh‚Äôs Prime Minister, Home Minister, Inspector General, Police Commissioner and all four Ahmed Brothers. 

None responded to our inquiries.

After the release of the investigation, Bangladesh‚Äôs Ministry of Foreign Affairs issued a statement describing our findings as a ‚Äúsmear campaign‚ÄĚ that was orchestrated by opponents of the regime based abroad.
It dismissed statements made by the brother of Bangladesh‚Äôs Chief of Army Staff s baseless and said Haris Ahmed had no links to Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina or any other state institution.

ŗ¶Üŗ¶≤ ŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶úŗ¶Ņŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņŗ¶¨ŗßáŗ¶¶ŗ¶® ŗ¶łŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶Į, ŗ¶Üŗ¶āŗ¶∂ŗ¶Ņŗ¶ē ŗ¶łŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶Į, ŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ēŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶ģŗ¶Ņŗ¶•ŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺ? ŗ¶™ŗ¶≤ŗ¶ĺŗ¶§ŗ¶ē ŗ¶Üŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶ģŗ¶Ņŗ¶¶ŗßáŗ¶į ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺŗ¶∂ŗßćŗ¶Įŗßá ŗ¶ėŗßĀŗ¶įŗßá ŗ¶¨ŗßáŗßúŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗßáŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņŗßüŗßá ŗ¶™ŗßĀŗ¶≤ŗ¶Ņŗ¶∂ŗßáŗ¶į ŗ¶¨ŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶Ėŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶ēŗßÄ? ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņŗ¶¨ŗßáŗ¶¶ŗ¶® ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺŗ¶∂ ŗ¶Ļŗ¶ďŗßüŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶™ŗ¶į ŗ¶łŗ¶įŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗßáŗ¶į ŗ¶¨ŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶§ŗ¶¨ŗßćŗ¶Į ŗ¶ēŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶Įŗ¶•ŗ¶ĺŗ¶Įŗ¶•? ŗ¶Źŗ¶á ŗ¶łŗ¶ģŗßüŗßá ŗ¶¶ŗßáŗ¶∂ŗßáŗ¶į ŗ¶óŗ¶£ŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶ßŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ģŗßáŗ¶į ŗ¶≠ŗßāŗ¶ģŗ¶Ņŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶ēŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶∂ŗßćŗ¶®ŗ¶¨ŗ¶Ņŗ¶¶ŗßćŗ¶ß?

snippet.title: 3D PEN VS GLUE GUN! 17 Cool Hacks And Crafts For You
snippet.description:
We‚Äôve tried every 3D pen and hot glue craft we could imagine, and here‚Äôs what we created. Aren‚Äôt 3D pens just amazing? You can create anything you can think of, make it colorful and give it purpose. Today, we wanted to experiment with something new, and we wanted to show you some amazing hacks you can create at home. snippet.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure Superman‚Äôs (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxYouTube

HBO Max: https://hbom.ax/YT

snippet.title: 2021 CHAKRA New Released Hindi Dubbed Movie | Naga Shaurya New Hindi Dubbed Movie | Mehreen Pirzada
snippet.description:
Gana (Naga Shaurya) returns to India for his sister Priya's (Sargun Kaur Luthra) marriage but is shocked to see her trying to commit suicide one night, and is shocked to learn she is pregnant but does not know who impregnated her. Gana explains this to her fianc√© Ravi (Prince Cecil) who understands the situation, helps Priya get aborted, and promises to keep this a secret. Gana further convinces Priya to move on and forget about the past, which she does and happily gets married. After her marriage, Gana violently fights and interrogates men who troubled Priya in the past, only to learn none of them are behind her impregnation. Soon, another mysteriously impregnated woman named Sadhana commits suicide, and Gana reads her suicide letter explaining she didn't know how she got pregnant without her knowledge. Gana meets her parents and discovers her hospital reports according to which she fainted 3 months ago and was admitted by someone. Realizing Priya also fainted and was admitted, Gana goes to the hospital and finds out Sadhana was admitted in an emergency by an ambulance. He then learns that more girls named Lakshmi and Monica were also admitted by a similar ambulance.

The next day, Gana's girlfriend Neha (Mehreen Pirzada) informs him about her friend who fainted in the mall and was taken in an ambulance that hasn't arrived at the hospital yet. Gana rushes to the hospital and with help from the technical department, chases after the ambulances equipped with trackers. He stops many ambulances but doesn't find Neha's friend inside. Soon, he reaches a dead end and abandons his bike. Using his parkour skills, he chases after an ambulance, only to find him looking at another one that isn't being tracked. He ambushes the ambulance, fights off the men inside, and rescues Neha's friend. On the other hand, a psychopathic pathologist named Dr. Manoj Kumar (Jisshu Sengupta) is revealed to be the mastermind behind the pregnant girls, who then eliminates the fishermen. Later, Neha questions Gana's recent attitude towards her, forcing him to reveal his mission and what happened to Priya. Soon, a minister's daughter named Sowmya is killed and her corpse is dropped in front of the police station. With Neha's help, Gana manages to access Sowmya's laptop and receives photos where he spots an old man, Manoj's grandfather. Further, Gana manages to access CCTV footage of Sowmya buying a perfume from a vendor who reveals the old man told him to sell the perfumes and paid him for it. Since Sowmya was a drug addict, she wasn't unconscious despite being subject to anesthesia and thus knew about Manoj. Despite his friend's insistence not to do so, Manoj ended up killing her. Back to the present, the cops ask Manoj to perform an autopsy on Sowmya.

Gana then explains to Neha that all the victims, though unrelated, were admitted to hospital because of Hypoglycemia induced artificially by a banned drug called Hypomacene. Gana later visits the mall to view surveillance footage and discovers an address that leads him to Manoj's house. Having seen him talk about the autopsy on TV, Gana asks him for help with the case while Manoj tells him to wait for coffee. Manoj explains to his friend that he'd kill Gana, but receiving a call from Neha about the old man dumping another corpse in front of the police station, Gana secretly runs away. A car chase ensues, resulting in the old man's death after Manoj drops a cargo container on his car. Gana then goes to Manoj's house where he discovers dead bodies in separate vessels before Manoj arrives there with his friend. Manoj's friend, who turns out to be his father, removes his belt and starts beating him. It is then revealed that Manoj was psychopathic as a kid and even killed his father who since then appeared as a hallucination. Back to the present,Gana fights with Manoj and beats his head with a glass bottle. He throws him to a wardrobe and Gana drops a chandelier over him. Manoj is laughing, but when he sees his death weapon coming towards him , he faints. The chandelier falls over Manoj killing him. He then receives a call from his father who pranks him into believing a man is trying to harass Priya. Gana arrives home, and finds out Priya is now happily pregnant with Ravi's child

For More Hindi Dubbed Movies :-

snippet.title: 28 PARENTING HACKS From Crafty Moms And Dads || Tips for Being Friends with Your Child
snippet.description:
Tips and tricks every parent will be thankful for. 

Being a parent isn‚Äôt an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyone‚Äôs favorite activity, but it can be very messy ‚ÄĒ and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little one‚Äôs outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day won‚Äôt take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know.

Now, with a frozen body that continues to drop below deadly temperature, how will Bani make it to safety?

snippet.title: Bangladesh: When will authorities clean up their act? | Conflict Zone
snippet.description:
For years, the government of Bangladesh has been criticized for its human rights record. Its reputation received another jolt this month with allegations of high-level bribery and corruption. DW‚Äôs Conflict Zone host Tim Sebastian confronts Gowher Rizvi, foreign affairs adviser to the country‚Äôs prime minister. 

Watch the program and let us know what you think below or join the conversation on Facebook¬†‚ÄĒ¬†https://www.facebook.com/dw.conflictzone¬†Conflict Zone is Deutsche Welle's top political interview. Every week, our hosts Tim Sebastian and Sarah Kelly are face to face with global decision-makers, seeking straight answers to straight questions, putting the spotlight on controversial issues and calling the powerful to account.

Twitter:¬†https://twitter.com/dw_conflictzone¬†
Facebook:¬†https://www.facebook.com/dw.conflictzone/¬†

More about Tim Sebastian:¬†http://www.dw.com/p/1G7K9¬†
More about Sarah Kelly:¬†https://www.dw.com/en/meet-sarah-kelly/a-52405688¬†

snippet.title: Kaabil Full Hindi Movie | Hritik Roshan & Yami Gautam New Bollywood HD Movies 2021 | New Hindi Films
snippet.description:
Kaabil (transl.‚ÄČCapable) is a 2017 Indian Hindi-language action thriller film[7][8] directed by Sanjay Gupta, written by Vijay Kumar Mishra, produced by Rakesh Roshan under his banner FilmKraft Productions.[9] It stars Hrithik Roshan, Yami Gautam, Ronit Roy and Rohit Roy. The music was composed by Rajesh Roshan. Principal photography of the film began on 30 March 2016.[10]

The film follows a blind voiceover artist who becomes disillusioned when his wife is raped and the perpetrators walk free. He becomes a vigilante and decides to seek revenge against those responsible for his wife's death, while also dodging police with a cover that no one would believe a blind man can kill someone.

Kaabil was released theatrically on 25 January 2017.[11][12] Roshan received the Nomination of Filmfare Award for Best Actor for his performance at the 63rd Filmfare Awards. In 2019, it was also released in China where it became commercially unsuccessful.[13]

Episode 409 : At The Store
-------------------------------------------
Three Friends - one blind, one mute, and one deaf are at a grocery store when they witness a crime taking place. A woman wearing a burkha and carrying a child is being chased by another man when impulsively she gives the baby to the deaf guy and leaves the store. The friends call CID, confused about what they should do. 

About CID:
--------------------
CID is an Indian detective television anthology series about India's Crime Investigation Department, created by B. P. Singh for Sony Entertainment Television India and Sony Entertainment Television Asia.  Following a pilot episode on 29 April 1997, the series premiered on 21 January 1998 and is the longest-running television series in India, having completed 19 years in January 2017 and entering the 20th year of its run. The show airs on Saturday and Sunday nights at 10:30 PM IST.

ŗ¶¨ŗ¶Ņŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶ęŗßčŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ ŗ¶Ļŗ¶Įŗ¶ľ, ŗ¶™ŗßĀŗ¶®ŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶Įŗ¶ľ ŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶™ŗßāŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶¨ŗßáŗ¶į ŗ¶Öŗ¶¨ŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶•ŗ¶ĺŗ¶Įŗ¶ľ ŗ¶ęŗ¶Ņŗ¶įŗßá ŗ¶Üŗ¶łŗßáŗ¶®ŗ•§ ŗ¶Źŗ¶ēŗ¶łŗ¶ģŗ¶Įŗ¶ľ ŗ¶Üŗ¶ēŗ¶¨ŗ¶į ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶Üŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶•ŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶Ėŗ¶§ŗßá ŗ¶¨ŗ¶≤ŗßá ŗ•§ ŗ¶ēŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶§ŗßĀ ŗ¶Ź "ŗ¶üŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶ü ŗ¶ģŗ¶Ņ" ŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶üŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶∂ŗßĀŗ¶®ŗ¶≤ŗßá ŗ¶™ŗßāŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶ď ŗ¶üŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶óŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶° ŗ¶Ļŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗßá ŗ¶™ŗ¶°ŗ¶ľŗßá ŗ•§ ŗ¶Üŗ¶į ŗ¶§ŗ¶Ėŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶łŗßá ŗ¶łŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĺŗ¶áŗ¶ēŗßá ŗ¶Ļŗ¶Ņŗ¶āŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶≠ŗ¶ĺŗ¶¨ŗßá ŗ¶¨ŗßáŗ¶¶ŗ¶ģ ŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶ßŗ¶į ŗ¶∂ŗßĀŗ¶įŗßĀ ŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗßáŗ•§ ŗ¶Źŗ¶§ŗßá ŗ¶Čŗ¶™ŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶•ŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ snippet.title: ŗ¶Öŗ¶¶ŗßćŗ¶≠ŗßĀŗ¶§ ŗ¶¶ŗßćŗ¶¨ŗßÄŗ¶™ŗßá ŗ¶§ŗßĆŗ¶Ļŗ¶Ņŗ¶¶ ŗ¶Üŗ¶ęŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶¶ŗ¶Ņ | Munshiganj | Mawa Ghat | Tawhid Afridi | Vlog 79
snippet.description:
TAWHID AFRIDI - BIKRAMPUR - MUNSHIGANJ - MAWA GHAT - PADMA BRIDGE - ŗ¶§ŗßĆŗ¶Ļŗ¶Ņŗ¶¶ ŗ¶Üŗ¶ęŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶¶ŗ¶Ņ - ŗ¶¶ŗßćŗ¶¨ŗßÄŗ¶™

In this vlog we showed the beauty of Munshiganj like Mawa Ghat, Padma Bridge, Ilish or Hilsa Fish & Dhaka Mawa Highway.

Edited By : Mahabub Hasan Murad
Color Grading : Hayat Mahmud

MUNSHIGANJ :-
Munshiganj, also historically known as Bikrampur, is a district in central Bangladesh. It is a part of the Dhaka Division and borders Dhaka District.

PADMA BRIDGE :-
The Padma Multipurpose Bridge is a multipurpose road-rail bridge across the Padma River, the main distributary of Ganges, under construction in Bangladesh with its own resources. It will connect Louhajong, Munshiganj to Shariatpur and Madaripur, linking the south-west of the country, to northern and eastern regions.

ILISH / HILSA :-
The ilish, also known as the ilisha, hilsa, hilsa herring or hilsa shad, is a species of fish related to the herring, in the family Clupeidae. It is a very popular and sought-after food fish in the Indian Subcontinent. The most famous hilsha fish comes from Chandpur District, Bangladesh.

TAWHID AFRIDI - MUNSHIGANJ - HILSA FISH - PADMA BRIDGE - MAWA GHAT - TANVIR RAHI

#Munshiganj #TawhidAfridi #Vlog79

VYRL Originals brings to you 2021's biggest party anthem - Drunk n High by hitmaker Mellow D & Aastha Gill starring Bollywood actress Adah Sharma for a one of a kind collaboration. The song has been composed by Akull and Mellow D, lyrics have been written by Mellow D and music video is a fun and quirky storyline directed by Robby Singh.

This party banger song is sure to set you in a mood to celebrate and lift your spirits this new year. Watch the video till the end to see @Adah Sharma  in her element ;).

snippet.title: COBRA GIRL 2021 - New Hollywood Hindi Dubbed Action Movie | #Latest Released Hindi Dubbed Movie 2021
snippet.description:
Summaries:
Chanachol, recently returned to Thailand after living overseas, signs up for a tour to get back in touch with Thai culture, and finds himself attracted to the tour guide, Mekhala. There are several problems with the relationship: Chanachol is married, with family, and Mekhala has a mysterious, symbiotic relationship with a deadly cobra, and many of her previous suitors have ended up dead.
Director: M.L. Pundhevanop Dhewakul
Stars: Shahkrit Yamnarm, Karnpitchar Ketmanee, Jiravich Pongpaijit

snippet.title: Sesh Obhimaan (Yevadu 2) Bengali Dubbed Full Movie | Ram Charan, Kajal Aggarwal
snippet.description: The movie story deals with Abhiram a handsome looking NRI, who is born and brought up in London. Even though he lives abroad, Abhiram loves Indian culture and family values. One fine day, he comes to know about his dad's past which is related back to a huge family based in India.In order to fulfill his dad's dream, Abhiram lands in India. There he finds out that his roots are based in the joint family of Balaraju. Rest of the story is as to how Abhiram manages to successfully enter the family, and wins the love of everyone.

snippet.title: Godzilla vs. Kong ‚Äď Official Trailer
snippet.description:
In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.
¬†
*Available on @HBOMax in the US only, for 31 days, at no extra cost to subscribers.

https://www.godzillavskong.com/
https://www.facebook.com/GodzillaVsKong
https://www.instagram.com/godzillavskong/
https://twitter.com/GodzillaVsKong

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, ‚ÄúGodzilla vs. Kong,‚ÄĚ the next epic adventure in Legendary‚Äôs cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in ‚ÄúGodzilla vs. Kong‚ÄĚ as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titans‚ÄĒinstigated by unseen forces‚ÄĒis only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander Skarsg√•rd (‚ÄúBig Little Lies,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúThe Little Drummer Girl‚ÄĚ), Millie Bobby Brown (‚ÄúStranger Things‚ÄĚ), Rebecca Hall (‚ÄúChristine,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúProfessor Marston and the Wonder Women‚ÄĚ), Brian Tyree Henry (‚ÄúJoker,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúSpider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse‚ÄĚ), Shun Oguri (‚ÄúWeathering with You‚ÄĚ), Eiza Gonz√°lez (‚ÄúFast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw‚ÄĚ), Julian Dennison (‚ÄúDeadpool 2‚ÄĚ), with Kyle Chandler (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters‚ÄĚ) and Demi√°n Bichir (‚ÄúThe Nun,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúThe Hateful Eight‚ÄĚ).
Wingard (‚ÄúThe Guest,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúYou‚Äôre Next‚ÄĚ) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (‚ÄúThor: Ragnarok‚ÄĚ) and Max Borenstein (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúKong: Skull Island‚ÄĚ), story by Terry Rossio (‚ÄúPirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No Tales‚ÄĚ) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters‚ÄĚ), based on the character ‚ÄúGodzilla‚ÄĚ owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

The director‚Äôs behind-the-scenes creative team included director of photography Ben Seresin (‚ÄúThe Mummy,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúWorld War Z‚ÄĚ), production designers Owen Paterson (‚ÄúJumanji: Welcome to the Jungle,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúGodzilla‚ÄĚ) and Thomas S. Hammock (‚ÄúBlair Witch‚ÄĚ), editor Josh Schaeffer (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters‚ÄĚ), costume designer Ann Foley (‚ÄúSkyscraper‚ÄĚ) and visual effects supervisor John ‚ÄúDJ‚ÄĚ DesJardin (upcoming ‚ÄúZack Snyder‚Äôs Justice League‚ÄĚ).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, ‚ÄúGodzilla vs. Kong.‚ÄĚ  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.

The film stars Alexander Skarsg√•rd (‚ÄúBig Little Lies,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúThe Little Drummer Girl‚ÄĚ), Millie Bobby Brown (‚ÄúStranger Things‚ÄĚ), Rebecca Hall (‚ÄúChristine,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúProfessor Marston and the Wonder Women‚ÄĚ), Brian Tyree Henry (‚ÄúJoker,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúSpider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse‚ÄĚ), Shun Oguri (‚ÄúWeathering with You‚ÄĚ), Eiza Gonz√°lez (‚ÄúFast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw‚ÄĚ), Julian Dennison (‚ÄúDeadpool 2‚ÄĚ), with Kyle Chandler (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters‚ÄĚ) and Demi√°n Bichir (‚ÄúThe Nun,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúThe Hateful Eight‚ÄĚ).
Wingard (‚ÄúThe Guest,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúYou‚Äôre Next‚ÄĚ) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (‚ÄúThor: Ragnarok‚ÄĚ) and Max Borenstein (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúKong: Skull Island‚ÄĚ), story by Terry Rossio (‚ÄúPirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No Tales‚ÄĚ) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters‚ÄĚ), based on the character ‚ÄúGodzilla‚ÄĚ owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

The director‚Äôs behind-the-scenes creative team included director of photography Ben Seresin (‚ÄúThe Mummy,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúWorld War Z‚ÄĚ), production designers Owen Paterson (‚ÄúJumanji: Welcome to the Jungle,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúGodzilla‚ÄĚ) and Thomas S. Hammock (‚ÄúBlair Witch‚ÄĚ), editor Josh Schaeffer (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters‚ÄĚ), costume designer Ann Foley (‚ÄúSkyscraper‚ÄĚ) and visual effects supervisor John ‚ÄúDJ‚ÄĚ DesJardin (upcoming ‚ÄúZack Snyder‚Äôs Justice League‚ÄĚ).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, ‚ÄúGodzilla vs. Kong.‚ÄĚ  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.

snippet.description:
BANGLA NATOK - AMI PREM KORTE CHAI - TAWHID AFRIDI
Presenting a new bangla natok "Ami Prem Korte Chai", Written & Created by "TA Team", Starring "Tawhid Afridi" & Many more. Hope you will enjoy our this Bangla New Natok.

Created By : TA Team

snippet.description:
@Ssoftoons Animation  presents Dosh Hater Bou, our new magical story
In this story we see the transformation of a households younger wife. She changes from a lazy, sleepy person to an active lady, interested in housework.
Take this journey with us to learn a moral lesson in a fun way

Caution : Not recommended for people below 14 years of age

A B O U T  N T V 
From unbiased and comprehensive News to Entertainment programs, International Television Channel Ltd. (NTV) has maintained its flagship position across all verticals since its beginning and became one of the most popular TV channels in Bangladesh. With the slogan ‚ÄėSomoyer Sathe Agamir Pothe‚Äô meaning ‚Äėheading towards the future with time‚Äô, holding Bangla language and culture close to heart, Al-haj Mohammad Mosaddak Ali founded NTV on 3 July 2003.
NTV offers diverse mix of programs such as news bulletins, current affairs, talk shows, soap operas, educational, religious, politics related programs, drama, movie, reality shows and other entertainment programs. NTV delivers reliable information across all platforms: TV, Digital platform (ntvbd.com) and Mobile. Apart from Bangladesh, NTV broadcasts its programmes in UK, USA, Canada, some parts of Europe, Middle East, and beyond. Enjoy and stay connected with us!!!
